name: codex-browser-recorder
description: Preflight local requirements or save one approved Chrome Browser test flow as a local H.264 MP4 with pointer feedback when applicable.

interface.shortDescription: Preflight or save a Chrome flow as MP4.
interface.longDescription: Checks local recording requirements without Browser activity, or saves one approved Chrome Browser test flow as a validated, audio-free H.264 MP4 with visible cursor and click feedback for pointer actions.
capabilities: Local Chrome Browser test-flow recording with pointer cursor and click feedback
defaultPrompt: Use $record-browser to preflight local recording requirements without opening a Browser tab.
Use $record-browser to save one approved same-origin Chrome navigation flow as a local MP4.
Use $record-browser to record one approved pointer-driven Chrome flow with a visible cursor.
